description: An impressionist landscape depicting several barges moored along a river at Saint-Mammes. The flat-bottomed cargo boats cluster in the middle ground, their dark hulls reflected in the calm water. On the right bank, green grasses and wildflowers line the shore. In the distance, trees, rooftops, and a church spire emerge under a pale, overcast sky. The brushwork is loose and luminous, capturing the soft atmospheric light of the Seine valley.
